sectiondef.header: GECKO_pin configuration bit field positions and masks.

memberdef.name: GECKO_PSEL
memberdef.initializer: (((GECKO_PORT_##port & GECKO_PORT_MSK) << GECKO_PORT_POS) | \ ((GECKO_PIN(##pin##) & GECKO_PIN_MSK) << GECKO_PIN_POS) | \ ((GECKO_FUN_##fun & GECKO_FUN_MSK) << GECKO_FUN_POS))

briefdescription.para: Utility macro to build GECKO psels property entry.
Utility macro to build GECKO_psels property entry.
